{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Mind magic
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The magic disciplines of the guards were mind magic.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
